steps.title: Spot the defining clue
steps.content: The phrase after the colon — “a well‑executed marketing campaign helped to make James Redfield's novel *The Tenth Insight* the tenth‑best‑selling novel of 1996” — shows that the blank must name something that a marketing campaign exemplifies.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content:
Publicity means the attention or promotion that a marketing campaign generates, which directly fits the role described.
The other three either describe unrelated qualities (practicality, complexity, originality) or contradict the idea that a marketing campaign contributes to success.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
